use_cases: Navigate through paginated article or content pages
Browse through search results or filtered lists
Navigate product catalogs or inventory listings
Switch between documentation or help pages
Move through course lesson or tutorial sequences
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple variants and sizes that serves as the building block for text-based pagination interfaces. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility, CVA for variant management, and full accessibility support including keyboard navigation and focus states. Designed with a minimalist flat aesthetic using subtle shadows and standard Tailwind styling for seamless integration into any web application.
